title: synotis jowaiensis
intro: Synotis jowaiensis is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. It is native to the Eastern Himalayas and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Synotis jowaiensis is often used in the form of extracts or decoctions, and it is also used to make traditional remedies such as teas and infusions.
